CommunityApplications.Profile:
CuratorX is a chat-first Plex collection curator for self-hosted homelabs. Connect Plex, Radarr, Sonarr, TMDB, and your preferred LLM (or Ollama on the Unraid host). Features include RAG over your library, confirmation-gated *arr actions, optional household Sign in with Plex, and dual-mode MCP (privacy + full).
**Support:** GitHub Issues — https://github.com/romwil/curatorx/issues **Docs:** https://github.com/romwil/curatorx/tree/main/docs **Install notes:** https://github.com/romwil/curatorx/blob/main/docs/wiki/Unraid.md
Keep port 8788 on a trusted LAN; do not WAN-expose without an authenticated reverse proxy.
